questions.question: A particle moves along a straight line with a velocity of 2m/s. If it travels for 8 hours, find its total displacement. (Assume that the particle's acceleration is zero).
questions.hint: First convert the time to seconds and use the equation of motion s = ut.

questions.question: A water tank can be filled at a rate of 2 liters per minute. If the tank can hold 96 liters of water, how many minutes will it take to fill the tank? (Assume that the water is filled continuously)
questions.hint: First divide the capacity of the tank by the rate at which the water is filled.

questions.question: A car travels from city A to city B at an average speed of 60 km/h and then returns from city B to city A at an average speed of 40 km/h. What is the average speed of the car for the entire journey? (Assume that the distance between the two cities is 150 km)
questions.hint: First find the total distance traveled and the total time taken, then use the formula for average speed.
